# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
    "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
    "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
    "parameters": {
        "vmName": {
            "type": "string"
        },
        "location": {
            "type": "string"
        }
    },
    "resources": [
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
            "apiVersion": "2019-04-01",
            "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "properties": {
                "hardwareProfile": {
                    "vmSize": "Standard_DS2_v2"
                },
                "osDisk": {
                    "createOption": "FromImage",
                    "managedDisk": {
                        "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
                    }
                },
                "networkInterfaceConfigurations": [
                    {
                        "name": "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '_nic')]",
                        "properties": {
                            "primary": true,
                            "ipConfigurations": [
                                {
                                    "name": "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '_nic-ipconfig')]",
                                    "properties": {
                                        "subnet": {
                                            "id": "/subscriptions/[subscription_id]/resourceGroups/[resource_group_name]/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/[virtual_network_name]/subnets/[subnet_name]"
                                        },
                                        "privateIPAddress": "[concat('10.0.2.', parameters('vmName'), '.1')]"
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }
                ],
                "storageProfile": {
                    "osDisk": {
                        "createOption": "FromImage"
                    },
                    "dataDisks": [
                        {
                            "name": "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '_datadisk')]",
                            "lun": 0,
                            "createOption": "Attach",
                            "managedDisk": {
                                "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
                            }
                        }
                    ]
                }
            },
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmName'), '_nic'))]"
            ],
            "outputs": {}
        }
    ],
    "variables": {
        "vmStorageProfile": {
            "osDiskSizeGB": 30,
            "dataDisksSizeGB": 64
        },
        "networkInterfaceConfig": {
            "subnetId": "/subscriptions/[subscription_id]/resourceGroups/[resource_group_name]/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/[virtual_network_name]/subnets/[subnet_name]"
        }
    }
}
